panels.name: Recovery Labs (after antibiotic cessation)
panels.preview: Improving across the board after antibiotics stopped: WBC normalized (7.8), lactate cleared, bilirubin and INR improving, creatinine recovering, off vasopressors. Cultures (final) all no growth.

panels.name: ICU Labs — Persistent Fevers / Worsening (Day ~16)
panels.preview: Worsening: bilirubin 9.5, INR 2.6, Cr 2.4, Na 134 → MELD ~40. WBC 11.0, lactate mildly up. Blood cultures x multiple sets NO GROWTH; procalcitonin 0.3 (within range). Eosinophils 7%. Fevers ongoing.

panels.name: Admission Labs
panels.preview: WBC 12.0, Hgb 8.6, Plt 80. Na 132, Cr 1.4 (baseline unknown). Tbili 4.2, AST 50, ALT 60, INR 1.9. MELD-Na ~25 at admission. (Paracentesis: 86 PMN, no organisms — negative for SBP.)

panels.name: Outpatient Weight-Loss Workup Labs
panels.preview: Initial outpatient evaluation of weight loss: mild anemia (Hgb 10.8), normal TSH, AFP mildly elevated (18, nonspecific in cirrhosis), HbA1c normal. Liver imaging pending at the time of acute presentation.
